subject: A new sign-in to your GitHub account
body:
Hey Rares,

A new sign-in was detected on your GitHub account.

Device: Chrome on Windows
Location: Bucharest, Romania
Time: March 15, 2026 at 2:30 PM EET

If this was you, no further action is needed.
If this wasn't you, please review your security settings: https://github.com/settings/security

Thanks,
The GitHub Team
label: legitimate

subject: You appeared in 12 searches this week
body:
Hi Rares,

You appeared in 12 searches this week. See who's looking at your profile.

- Tech companies in Bucharest
- Cybersecurity firms

View all: https://www.linkedin.com/me/search-appearances

LinkedIn

subject: Security alert: new device signed in
body:
Someone just signed in to your Google Account from a new Windows device.

New sign-in
Device: Windows Computer
Location: Romania

If this was you, you can ignore this message.
If not, check your account activity: https://myaccount.google.com/notifications

Google Security Team
